name: PAY_MONETARY_UNITS_VL
query: SELECT PAY_MONETARY_UNITS.MONETARY_UNIT_ID MONETARY_UNIT_ID, PAY_MONETARY_UNITS.CURRENCY_CODE CURRENCY_CODE, PAY_MONETARY_UNITS_TL.MONETARY_UNIT_NAME MONETARY_UNIT_NAME, PAY_MONETARY_UNITS.LEGISLATION_CODE LEGISLATION_CODE, PAY_MONETARY_UNITS.ENTERPRISE_ID ENTERPRISE_ID, PAY_MONETARY_UNITS.BASE_MONETARY_UNIT_NAME BASE_MONETARY_UNIT_NAME, PAY_MONETARY_UNITS.RELATIVE_VALUE RELATIVE_VALUE, PAY_MONETARY_UNITS.COMMENTS COMMENTS, PAY_MONETARY_UNITS.LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID LEGISLATIVE_DATA_GROUP_ID, PAY_MONETARY_UNITS.MODULE_ID MODULE_ID, PAY_MONETARY_UNITS.LAST_UPDATE_DATE LAST_UPDATE_DATE, PAY_MONETARY_UNITS.LAST_UPDATED_BY LAST_UPDATED_BY, PAY_MONETARY_UNITS.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, PAY_MONETARY_UNITS.CREATED_BY CREATED_BY, PAY_MONETARY_UNITS.CREATION_DATE CREATION_DATE, PAY_MONETARY_UNITS.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, PAY_MONETARY_UNITS_TL.LANGUAGE LANGUAGE, PAY_MONETARY_UNITS_TL.SOURCE_LANG SOURCE_LANG FROM PAY_MONETARY_UNITS, PAY_MONETARY_UNITS_TL WHERE PAY_MONETARY_UNITS.MONETARY_UNIT_ID = PAY_MONETARY_UNITS_TL.MONETARY_UNIT_ID AND PAY_MONETARY_UNITS_TL.LANGUAGE = USERENV('LANG')
